name: io.github.mnexa-ai/mcp-server
title: e2a — email for AI agents
description: Authenticated email gateway for AI agents — per-agent inboxes, HITL approval, SPF/DKIM verified.

environmentVariables.name: E2A_AGENT_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Default agent inbox (e.g. bot@your-domain.com). Optional — single-agent accounts auto-resolve.

environmentVariables.name: E2A_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Self-hosted e2a backend URL. Defaults to https://e2a.dev.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token: accepts an e2a API key (e2a_…) or OAuth 2.1 access token (ate2a_…)

e2a_api_key.description: Your e2a API key from https://e2a.dev
